title: Raw data for: Belite hydration at high temperature and pressure by  in situ synchrotron powder diffraction
author: Morales-Cantero, Alejandro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw data for: Belite hydration at high temperature and pressure by  in situ synchrotron powder diffraction 
 The raw data include Synchrotron X-Ray Powder Diffraction (SXRPD) as .txt files. 
   
 doi:   https://doi.org/10.1016/j.conbuildmat.2020.120825
